title: Ditto Generic Authentication Webhook Config Schema
description: JSON configuration for the generic authentication webhook.

JWTSecret.description: The secret used to verify the JWT signature. If not provided, JWT signature verification is skipped.

expirationField.description: The field in the JWT that contains the expiration time and the format of the expiration time. If not provided, the default is 'exp' in unix epoch format.

field.description: The name of the field in the JWT that contains the expiration time.

format.description: The format of the expiration time. Defaults to 'unix' for unix epoch time. Can also be 'iso' for ISO 8601 format.

userIDField.description: The field in the JWT that contains the userID needed to identify the user in Ditto

claims.description: A set of objects mapping claims to permission sets. Each key is a path to a claim in the JWT, in the form 'path.to.claim'. The value is an object listing all potential values of that claim and the permission set granted for that value.

clientInfo.description: Optional arbitrary JSON data to be passed through to the client. Can be an object, which will be directly copied into the response, or an array of paths to extract from JWT (e.g., 'user.metadata')

identityServiceMetadata.description: Optional metadata to be signed and shared between peers. Can be an object, which will be directly copied into the response, or an array of paths to extract from JWT. Amount of data should be kept small for performance.

permissions.description: Map of permission sets. Key is the name of the permission set, value is the permissions object.

read.description: Read permissions: '*' for everything, or object mapping collections to queries

write.description: Write permissions: '*' for everything, or object mapping collections to queries

remoteQuery.description: Enable remote queries (requires full read permission). Defaults to false.
